name: live-prototype
description: FICO Score Simulation Prototypes — Safe Driving Score & Credit Score

scripts.dev: concurrently -n driving,credit -c blue,yellow "npm run dev:driving" "npm run dev:credit"
scripts.build: npm --prefix driving-score run build && npm --prefix credit-score run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix driving-score run lint && npm --prefix credit-score run lint
